caption: Our story began here—the day we said yes to forever.
Together in the garden right after the ceremony.
Celebration with everyone we love in one place.
Memories we’ll keep for the rest of our lives.
Joy. Nothing else describes this moment.
Love
Family—old and new—all in one frame.
Forever starts today.
First dance. We practiced for weeks and still stepped on each other’s feet.
Vows under the oak tree at sunset.
Bouquet toss—someone’s going to be next.
Reception setup before the guests arrived.
Cake cutting. We went with vanilla and lemon.
Toasts from the best man and maid of honor.
Dancing until the last song.
Rings
Ceremony—the part we’ll never forget.
Bridal party on the steps. We couldn’t have done it without you.
Details: place cards, favors, and a lot of candles.
Venue at golden hour.
Getting ready in the morning with mimosas and good music.
First look. No words—just tears and laughter.
Portraits by the lake before the storm rolled in.
Guests arriving. So many faces we’ve missed.
Smiles all around.
Confetti exit. Worth every bit of cleanup.
Sunset portraits. The light was perfect.
Tables set and ready for dinner.
Flowers from the local florist—wild and simple.
Candles everywhere. It felt like a dream.
Hugs from grandma. She said she’d been waiting for this day.
Cheers to the newlyweds.
Sparkler send-off. Our favorite photo of the night.
Exit through the crowd. Best walk of our lives.
Newlyweds
Kiss
Walk down the aisle. Everything else faded away.
Moment
Day we’ll remember forever.
Always.
